title: To Lanthe
content:
You smilï؟½d, you spoke, and I believï؟½d,
By every word and smile deceivï؟½d.
Another man would hope no more;
Nor hope I what I hopï؟½d before:
But let not this last wish be vain;آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ 
Deceive, deceive me once again!
meaning:
Walter Savage Landor's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Lanthe"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
